routes.observed_source_signal: PromptBase sells prompts or agent skills/SKILL.md files, advertises 0% fees via direct link and 20% via marketplace, and mentions Stripe or Zoneless payouts.
routes.fit_reason: Strongest route because the product is already a Codex-style skill/template kit and PromptBase explicitly mentions agent skills/SKILL.md files.
local_gaps_before_external_review: Create route-specific listing copy that avoids revenue and marketplace-approval claims.
Prepare local screenshot placeholders from static files only.
Map PromptBase prompt/skill submission rules after browser approval.
Confirm payout route requirements through legal/payment review.
routes.next_local_proof: Draft a PromptBase-specific eligibility checklist and listing variant from existing local files only.

routes.observed_source_signal: Gumroad positions itself as a path to earn a first dollar online and sell digital products.
routes.fit_reason: Good low-complexity direct-download route for a Markdown/template bundle, but live demand and seller terms remain unverified.
local_gaps_before_external_review: Create Gumroad-style direct-download product page copy.
Prepare local package preview images or static screenshot placeholders.
Decide whether to create a zip only after internal package review.
Review seller terms, refunds, payout, tax, and account obligations after legal/payment approval.
routes.next_local_proof: Draft Gumroad-style direct-download route copy and a local asset checklist; do not zip, upload, price, or list.

routes.observed_source_signal: Lemon Squeezy supports digital products, lead magnets, pay-what-you-want, subscriptions, payments, and tax handling.
routes.fit_reason: Potentially strong for software/template products, but legal, tax, KYC, account, and payment obligations are heavier than a pure local direct-download review.
local_gaps_before_external_review: Choose whether this is a one-time digital download, lead magnet, license, or subscription route.
Create a tax/payment/legal question list for human review.
Prepare refund/support language without making live obligations.
Keep all payment and seller account work frozen.
routes.next_local_proof: Create a Lemon Squeezy route decision note comparing digital download, lead magnet, license, and subscription shapes.

recommendation.selected_route_reason: PromptBase is the closest semantic fit for a Codex skill/template kit and has the clearest source signal for agent skill artifacts.
recommendation.next_safe_local_task: Prepare PromptBase-specific local listing and eligibility checklist from existing package files, still without browser validation, account setup, payout setup, public listing, or submission.
do_not_request_or_execute: Do not open or browse marketplace pages from this packet.
Do not accept terms, configure payouts, or provide KYC/tax/payment information.
Do not create, upload, price, publish, promote, or submit any listing.
Do not create a zip for public distribution.
Do not mutate service requests, assign workers, start browser sessions, call APIs, or perform external actions.

checks.evidence: Agent Skill Starter Kit v0 manifest exists with 12 local files.
Four active holds remain: marketplace demand, terms/fees, public listing, account/payment setup.
Each route lists browser, legal/payment, public-action, and account/payment holds.
This packet writes local report artifacts only.

next_action: Prepare PromptBase-specific local listing and eligibility checklist from existing package files only; keep browser validation, seller terms, account setup, payout setup, zip/public upload, listing, and submission behind explicit approvals.
